### Website maintainer / Responsible for content
Dr. Thomas Hackl | 📧 t.hackl@rug.nl  
Assistant Professor for Eco-evolutionary Bioinformatics  
GELIFES, University of Groningen
Nijenborgh 7, 9747 AG Groningen, The Netherlands  

### Disclaimer
This site contains academic and educational content provided without commercial intent.
External links are provided for informational purposes; their content remains the
responsibility of their respective owners.

### Privacy
This website does not use cookies, analytics, or tracking. 
GitHub Pages may collect technical data as part of standard web hosting
(see [GitHub Privacy Statement](https://docs.github.com/en/site-policy/privacy-policies/github-privacy-statement)).
